title: Morena Restaurant – Latin Flavours Sydney
innerText:
No.1 Martin Place, Sydney

BOOK NOW
VIEW MENU
Traditions & Flavours.

Morena, located in Martin Place’s historic GPO Building, offers an elevated dining experience from Executive Chef Alejandro Saravia, showcasing the vibrant flavours and diverse cuisines of Latin America through authentic ingredients and warm hospitality.

Menu.

The menu highlights dishes from Peru, Colombia, Mexico, Venezuela, Argentina, and Brazil, complemented by curated wines and Latin-inspired signature cocktails.

VIEW MENU
Ethos.

Morena stems from Alejandro Saravia’s 15-year mission to elevate Australia’s view of Latin American cuisine while honouring its authentic flavours, traditions, and cultural roots.

With a focus on seasonal produce, Morena continues his commitment to working directly with local farmers and producers, while sourcing key ingredients from Latin America to preserve genuine regional taste.

Team.

Lead by Executive Chef Alejandro Saravia, the team at Morena welcome you to experience the warm hospitality of Latin America in the heart of Sydney.

title: Morena Restaurant – Latin Flavours Sydney
innerText:
No.1 Martin Place, Sydney

BOOK NOW
VIEW MENU
Traditions & Flavours.

Morena, located in Martin Place’s historic GPO Building, offers an elevated dining experience from Executive Chef Alejandro Saravia, showcasing the vibrant flavours and diverse cuisines of Latin America through authentic ingredients and warm hospitality.

Menu.

The menu highlights dishes from Peru, Colombia, Mexico, Venezuela, Argentina, and Brazil, complemented by curated wines and Latin-inspired signature cocktails.

VIEW MENU
Ethos.

Morena stems from Alejandro Saravia’s 15-year mission to elevate Australia’s view of Latin American cuisine while honouring its authentic flavours, traditions, and cultural roots.

With a focus on seasonal produce, Morena continues his commitment to working directly with local farmers and producers, while sourcing key ingredients from Latin America to preserve genuine regional taste.

Team.

Lead by Executive Chef Alejandro Saravia, the team at Morena welcome you to experience the warm hospitality of Latin America in the heart of Sydney.
